dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WA... WAIT!! Shouldn't we help him!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Strawhat!! Get off of that Bon Chari!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Is that one of those tenryuu- Bito...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Did you give it tranquilizers every day?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're just terrible at training these things.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: is getting ruined one by one...
